emails.subject: Lost Creek Docs.
emails.body: Lost Creek Docs. Attached are redlines of the latest revisions to the documents. Upon your review we can forward to BR.

emails.subject: Re: Lost Creek Docs.
emails.body: Re: Lost Creek Docs. The contracts look fine to me. I checked with Mark and you can send them on the Chris and the others at BR. Thanks for all your hard work...James
